purpose: Select the smallest repair atom for the current blocking quality failure.
system_prompt: You are a PDF repair planner. Repair only the failed class and scope. Do not bundle unrelated visual changes. Return strict JSON.
user_prompt_template: Select repair for run {{run_id}} loop {{loop_id}}. Failed findings: {{failed_findings}}. Page/region strategy: {{page_strategy}}. Available repair atoms: {{repair_atom_catalog}}. Prior loops: {{prior_loop_summary}}. Output one repair plan or terminal failure. If D7 reported a blocking failure, you must not skip D8; return REPAIR with a repair_plan, NEEDS_EVIDENCE for missing required evidence, or S_FAIL_QUALITY with explicit unrepairable_reason. D8 selection alone is not a completed repair loop: the executor must persist docs/reports/<run_id>/repair_loop_<n>.json before leaving Lx_RepairLoop. That record must include selected failure_class, repair_atom or unrepairable_reason, target_state, target_scope, expected_effect, verification_to_run, deferred_failures, and execution_status. If no repair atom is executed, set execution_status to not_executed_unrepairable or partial_not_full_loop; do not claim product repair success. If a repair atom is executed, the executor must first materialize repair_patch_<n>.json with build_repair_patch.py and apply it with apply_repair_patch.py before routing to S5_TranslationPlan, S6_LayoutPlan, or S7_GenerateCandidate as required; then regenerate or rematerialize the changed artifact and re-enter S8_VerifyProductQuality with fresh evidence. If a selected repair atom produces operation_count=0 for the current policy, record skipped_noop_repairs and try the next executable non-no-op repair atom when available; a no-op patch plus regeneration is not effective repair evidence. If max repair loops allows another pass, use prior_loop_summary to avoid repeating the same (gate_id, repair_atom) before trying another executable blocking repair. Default assumption for visual failures is layout repair, not retranslation. D2/S5 regeneration is allowed only when the failed class is semantic_translation_authenticity_fail, semantic_coverage_fail, semantic_translation_preflight_fail, or when constrained-slot evidence explicitly proves the required compact semantic variant is missing. If the semantic text is valid, table_text_legibility_fail and legend_label_alignment_fail route first to S7_GenerateCandidate with constrained_slot_layout_fit_repair or wrapped_constrained_text_image_fit, not D2. Ordinary short_label_legibility_fail and profile-declared compact_label legibility failure route first to S6_LayoutPlan with expandable_text_slot_reflow_repair so page labels and explanatory labels may use current-page whitespace before font shrink. Only when D7 evidence proves the label is inside a dense table/chart, matrix, legend, navigation, or TOC-like hard slot may short_label_legibility_fail route to constrained_slot_layout_fit_repair. If the failed class is source_relative_visual_baseline_fail, repair the evidence chain by rerunning S3_SourceExtract or S7_GenerateCandidate so each generated region records source unit ids that resolve in source_extraction.json; do not tune visual thresholds. Route metric_value_hierarchy_fail to S6_LayoutPlan with metric_value_font_hierarchy_repair only when the region has generic numeric amount evidence; unit-only labels must be reclassified to label/table roles instead. The repair must preserve source-relative KPI/metric font hierarchy using current-page font statistics and must not introduce fixed point-size constants. Route insertion_collision_fail to S6_LayoutPlan with region_collision_layout_repair: reclassify same-row panel/table headings as constrained table_cell or compact_label, apply min_source_width_page_ratio_for_reflow to every expandable kind, and remove unsafe target_language_reflow or target_composition expansion that caused overlapping insertion bboxes. Route hero_banner_text_readability_fail and title_readability_fail to heading_frame_fit_or_short_title_variant or heading_font_fit_curve_repair; route decorative_numeric_merge_bbox_fail to S7_GenerateCandidate with decorative_numeric_merge_repair; route top_lead_body_reflow_fail to S6_LayoutPlan with top_lead_body_reflow_policy_repair. Route body_paragraph_readability_fail to target_composition_body_reflow_repair. If semantic text is valid but table_note, footnote, or zh-to-en body/body_flow still overflows after textbox probing, route to S7_GenerateCandidate with wrapped_constrained_text_image_fit instead of asking D2 to invent abbreviations. Route footnote_readability_fail to footnote_fit_curve_repair, sidebar_navigation_legibility_fail or sidebar_glyph_orientation_fail to side_navigation_rotated_image_repair or rotated_horizontal_text_image_draw_mode, image_color_integrity_fail to image_redaction_exclusion_repair, text_image_collision_fail to avoid_region_reflow or image_redaction_exclusion_repair, single_dense_paragraph to body_flow_paragraph_gap_rebalance, body_flow_fallback_truncation to short_continuation_and_reflow_frame_repair, dense_page_body_band_fragmentation to dense_page_body_band_flow_repair, background_delta_fail or background_delta to background_fill_resample, background_residue_artifact, inner_background_delta, text_image_background_delta, uncovered wide_line_patch_risk in redaction_metrics, or failed background_cover_metrics to background_residue_fill_resample. That repair must regenerate S7 evidence with current-run outside-ring or inner-bbox pixel-cluster fill sampling plus region_background_cover or residual_wide_line_background_cover when current-run geometry requires it. For event_card, short_label, legend, and sidebar, do not treat background_delta alone as blocking when inner/background-residue evidence is clean; classify it as a warning unless crop evidence shows a real patch artifact. For large saturated/color background covers, the S7 repair must use draw_mode=row_sampled_image_patch instead of solid_vector_fill and record sample_zoom plus patch_size_px. Route failed_probe_residue to textbox_probe_isolation_repair. Preserve deferred_failures when multiple blocking failures exist.

properties.repair_plan: object(repair_id, repair_atom, target_scope, expected_effect, verification_to_run) or null when verdict=S_FAIL_QUALITY with unrepairable_reason

failure_policy: If no available repair atom matches the failed class, return S_FAIL_QUALITY with unrepairable_reason rather than inventing a repair. Skipping D8 after a D7 blocking failure is a process-contract failure.
anti_overfit_policy: Repair selection must be driven by failure class and region type, not document identity.
